modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error prevents submission of Dental Hygiene Evaluations forms

full_description_text: I can't submit the Dental Hygiene Evaluations forms because of an error. The forms just won't go through, and it's really frustrating. This is happening when I try to submit them, and I need to get this done.

description: I can't submit the Dental Hygiene Evaluations forms because of an error. The forms just won't go through, and it's really frustrating. This is happening when I try to submit them, and I need to get this done.
